title: Supermarket price comparison
instruction: Read the data and answer the questions.
context: Weekly shopping basket prices for the same items: Tesco £68.50 | Asda £62.30 | Sainsbury's £71.20 | Lidl £54.80 | Aldi £53.60

questions.question: Which supermarket is the most expensive?
Which word means the difference between the highest and lowest price?
What is the range between the cheapest and most expensive basket?
What is the mean (average) price of the five baskets?
You shop at Aldi every week for 4 weeks. How much do you spend in total?
By shopping at Aldi instead of Sainsbury's each week, how much do you save in one year (52 weeks)?
